name: Viltrox AF 33mm f/1.4 Lens
description: Compact and comfortable, the AF 33mm f/1.4 from Viltrox is a normal-length prime lens designed for mirrorless cameras.

features.Key Features:: APS-C Format | f/1.4 to f/16 | 50mm (Full-Frame Equivalent) | One ED Element, One HR Element | HD Nano Multi-Layer Coating | STM Stepping AF Motor | Integrated USB Port for Firmware Updates | 9-Blade Diaphragm
